title: ALT/GPT  Detection Assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e42sp","text":"Intended use:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"enjub","text":"Kinetic system for Alanine Aminotransferase (ALT/ GPT) activity determination.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1mqu9","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dovm2","text":"Teste Principle:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dn3m8","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7c3v2","text":"ALT catalyzes the transfer of amino groups from Alanine to Ketoglutarate, yielding pyruvate and Glutamate. The pyruvate is reduced to lactate by for action of the lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) which oxidizes NADH to NAD+.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":3},{"style":"sup","offset":217,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"12thm","text":"The reduction of the absorbance at 340 nm, as consequence of NADH oxidation, must be photometricaly monitored, and is proportional to the ALT activity in the sample.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3u1gs","text":"Aminotransferase determination involves the following reactions:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6bp8o","text":"L-alanine + Ketoglutarate ---(ALT) → Pyruvate + L-Glutamate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dponm","text":"Pyruvate + NADH ---(LDH)→  NAD + L-lactate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3acec","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"6cq4e","text":"Reagents are for “in vitro” diagnostic use. Use the reagents according to the working procedures for clinical laboratories.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1d679","text":"Storage and stability - Unopened reagents, when stored at indicated temperature, are stable up to expiration date shown on the label.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"5f7pm","text":"Spectrophotometer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d9heu","text":"- Micropipettes and pipettes for measuring the stated volumes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"98afr","text":"- Water bath at temperature indicated under PROCEDURE.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fhe4m","text":"- Stopwatch.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"3l422","text":"The reagents contain sodium azide as preservative. Avoid ingestion. In case of eyes contact, immediately flush eyes with plenty of water and get prevent azide accumulation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
